# JM OS Audio Assets
Place your custom .ogg files in this directory.

Recommended filenames:
- JM_Ringtone.ogg (Primary Ringtone)
- JM_Notification.ogg (System Notification)
- JM_Alarm.ogg (Default Alarm)
- PowerOn.ogg (Boot Animation / Startup Sound)
- Lock.ogg (Screen Lock)
- Unlock.ogg (Screen Unlock)
- ChargingStarted.ogg (Power Connected)
- LowBattery.ogg (Battery Warning)

The build system is configured to automatically include any files placed here into the system image.
